name: Ludlow Town Recreation Area
description: Ludlow Town Recreation Area is a place to play pickleball in Ludlow, VT. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Maxfield Outdoor Sports Complex, White River Junction
description: Come play pickleball at Maxfield Outdoor Sports Complex, White River Junction in Hartford, VT! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Plymouth Community Center
description: Plymouth Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Plymouth, VT. There is 1 indoor asphalt court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Riverside Recreation Park/Springfield
description: Riverside Recreation Park/Springfield is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Springfield, VT. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Springfield Community Center gymnasium
description: Come play pickleball at Springfield Community Center gymnasium in Springfield, VT! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are private.

name: The Woodstock Inn & Resort
description: The Woodstock Inn & Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodstock, VT. There are 6 clay and hard courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Vail Field Tennis and Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Vail Field Tennis and Pickleball Courts in Woodstock, VT! There are 5 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water.
